example: His attitude towards learning English helped him improve quickly.
zh: 態度，對某事的看法或感受
ja: 態度、物事に対する考え方や感じ方

example: She can communicate well in English despite her low level.
ja: コミュニケーションをとる、意思を伝える

example: She dreaded going to piano lessons because she was afraid of making mistakes.
His self image affected his confidence in speaking English.
ja: 自己イメージ、自分自身の認識

example: I went to a cyber cafe when my computer broke down.
zh: 網咖，提供上網服務的場所
ja: インターネットカフェ、ネット利用ができる場所

example: He showed no embarrassment even though his friends were watching him play.
She was focused on the conversation, not on her mistakes.
ja: 集中している、注意を向けている

example: Being focused on the person you speak to makes communication more effective.
zh: 有效的，產生預期效果的
ja: 効果的な、期待した効果をもたらす

example: Native speakers usually have a natural fluency in their language.
Most English conversations in the world involve non-native speakers.
English is a tool to get a result, not just an art to master.
ja: 道具、目的を達成するための手段

example: Clarity in communication is more important than perfect grammar.
ja: 明瞭さ、はっきりしていること

example: Your brain cannot multitask well when you try to speak and correct yourself at the same time.
zh: 多工處理，同時處理多項任務
ja: マルチタスク、複数の作業を同時に行うこと

example: She spoke English with confidence despite her mistakes.
zh: 自信，對自己能力的信任
ja: 自信、自分の能力を信じること

example: Focus on the result you want to achieve in communication.
